query: Please ingest this public PDF URL into Page Index after checking whether it already exists: https://example.com/paper.pdf
why: URL-based ingestion with duplicate check should trigger this skill.

query: Add these two public PDF URLs to Page Index, but don't duplicate anything already there.
why: Batch URL ingestion with conservative duplicate handling should trigger this skill.

query: I already have a direct PDF URL, can you submit it to Page Index?
why: A direct public PDF URL submission request should trigger this skill.

query: Find this paper in Page Index and tell me whether it exists.
why: Paper finding only should trigger pageindex-find-papers instead.

query: Read this verified Page Index paper fully and summarize it.
why: Reading/summarization belongs to the read or summarize Page Index skills.

query: Here is a local PDF path, can you upload it to Page Index?
why: Local file paths are out of scope for this URL-only ingestion skill.
